fields.label: Online (ATC)

fields.title: NoActionNeed
fields.label: Informational Items
fields.description: Show items that require no physical action (verify / check only)

fields.label: Anti-Ice (≤0°C)

fields.description: Short runway procedure or departure above 10 000 ft

fields.title: ZeroToTen
fields.label: 0°C – 10°C Conditions
fields.description: Temperature between 0°C and 10°C — additional checks required

fields.label: No Pushback
fields.description: No pushback required — engine start at stand
